title: Daewoo 1.5L Mini Slow Cooker – Compact Electric Cooker with Ceramic Bowl & Glass Lid, 3 Heat Settings (Low, High, Keep Warm), Ideal for Singles, Students, Couples, Energy Efficient, Black
features: Compact 1.5L Capacity for One or Two – Ideal for individuals, students or couples who want homemade meals in manageable portions without the waste
3 Heat Settings: Low, High, Keep Warm – Cook your way with full control, whether you're meal prepping for later or cooking dinner from scratch
Removable Ceramic Bowl & Glass Lid – Easy to clean, dishwasher safe bowl with see-through lid to monitor your food without losing heat
Energy Efficient 120W Performance – Save energy and money compared to conventional ovens while enjoying consistent, slow-cooked results
Safe, Sleek & Space-Saving Design – Cool-touch handles, compact size for smaller kitchens, and modern black finish that fits any style
description: From the manufacturer VARIABLE COOKING CONTROL This 3.5 litre Slow Cooker from Daewoo features 3 heat settings, ensuring your meals are perfectly cooked every time REMOVABLE STONEWARE POT To make cleaning a doddle, we've given the slow cooker a removable easy-clean stoneware bowl TEMPERED GLASS LID Keep an eye on your food with this strong, easily cleaned tempered glass lid, and LED indicator light that let's you check the status of the slow cooker

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Stainless steel; Stoneware pot; Dishwasher safe; 3 heat settings; Easy to clean; Power indicator
